infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Buddy Walk uses the camera to capture photos and videos to describe your surroundings.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Buddy Walk uses the microphone so you can ask questions by voice.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Buddy Walk uses your location to provide navigation and nearby place information.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Buddy Walk uses your location to provide navigation assistance.

plugins.cameraPermission: Buddy Walk uses the camera to capture photos and videos to describe your surroundings.
plugins.microphonePermission: Buddy Walk uses the microphone so you can ask questions by voice.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Buddy Walk uses your location for navigation assistance.
